name: Minecraft Launcher
description: Install and manage Minecraft instances — Vanilla, Fabric, Forge, NeoForge and Quilt — with mod, resource pack and shader pack downloads, Java management, and live launch logs. Inspired by modern launchers, built with luma's own design.
details:
A clean, fast Minecraft launcher inside luma. Create instances for any release or snapshot, pick a mod loader, and let luma handle downloading the game files, libraries, assets and the right Java runtime automatically.

Sign in with an offline (cracked-style) profile with zero setup, or link a Microsoft account for online-mode play. Every instance gets its own mods, resource packs, shader packs, saves and screenshots folder, plus a live log view while the game is running and full control over memory, JVM arguments, resolution and Java path.

Mod loader installers and in-app mod/resource pack browsing are on the roadmap — this first release focuses on getting a rock-solid Vanilla launch experience right.
